subject: Fix sonar issue in node
commit_message:
Fix sonar issue in node

Fix issue reported by sonar on more than allowed params in
method using a builder object. modify aaf cadi to 2.1.9
since build failed in epsdk-fw project. Revert the pom.xml
file due to merge conflict

Issue-ID: PORTAL-481
Change-Id: Icc9de33aa9c7d7c348bb22985a2f944f92516bd0
Signed-off-by: krisjinka <kris.jinka@samsung.com>

Hi Manoop, Sundar, I request some help in this error., not sure why its failing for the aaf 2.1.7-SNAPSHOT jar dependency., 
Before this, 
In project org.onap.portal.sdk:epsdk-fw , i changed the pom.xml to modify the aaf-cadi-aaf:jar: to 2.1.9 and the build was successfull., 

After that I changed to aaf-cadi-aaf:jar:2.1.7 , it worked., 
please let me know should i change the pom.xml in epsdk-fw submodule ?
Allways Appreciate your help
